falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 swing low equivalent would invalidate the 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, as that bottom held 4950-5000 zone; this would signal structural breakdown not bottoming

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom saw VIX peak at 38.57 but not sustain above 35; sustained elevation would indicate panic regime inconsistent with bottom formation and suggest blowoff score of 39 was understated

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and credit spreads (HY-IG) widen past 150bps simultaneously
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination signals flight-to-safety recession pricing, not the growth-scare-then-recovery dynamic of August 2024; would falsify the macro regime similarity

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
